sub_mechanisms: M_1: define Sobolev-norm-bounded weight perturbation ||δw||_{k,p} < r
M_2: apply embedding theorem to derive C^m bound on loss difference
M_3: compute Sobolev embedding constant for basin width
M_4: bound = embedding constant * Sobolev norm radius
stripped_llm_application: Bound weight perturbations in an integral-smoothness norm; use the embedding into continuous-derivative space to derive a pointwise loss-deviation bound; basin width = embedding constant × radius.
novelty_claim_stripped: Basin-Like LL (2505.17646) measures basin empirically; SAM-style flatness regularizers measure scalar curvature; this candidate uses SOBOLEV EMBEDDING CONSTANT as the basin-width theoretical lower bound.
